chapter_description: Ionic, covalent, metallic bonds, hybridization, VSEPR theory, molecular orbital theory

questions.text: The hybridization of carbon in CH₄ is:
questions.explanation: 4 sigma bonds, 0 lone pairs → sp³ hybridization

questions.text: In BF₃, what is the F-B-F bond angle (in degrees)?
questions.explanation: BF₃ has sp² hybridization with trigonal planar geometry → 120°

questions.text: According to molecular orbital theory, which of the following is paramagnetic?
questions.explanation: O₂ has two unpaired electrons in π* antibonding orbitals, making it paramagnetic.
